info.title: Hindclaw API
info.description: Access control API for Hindsight memory server

get.description: List API keys for a user. Keys are masked after creation.
Resolve and return full permissions for a given context.

ApiKeyCreateResponse.title: ApiKeyCreateResponse
ApiKeyCreateResponse.description: API key at creation time — full key shown once.

ApiKeyResponse.title: ApiKeyResponse
ApiKeyResponse.description: API key in list view — key is masked after creation.

BankPermissionResponse.title: BankPermissionResponse
BankPermissionResponse.description:
Bank-level permission entry with scope identifiers.

Returned by GET /banks/:bank/permissions endpoints.

ChannelResponse.title: ChannelResponse
ChannelResponse.description: Channel mapping returned by GET/POST endpoints.

GroupResponse.title: GroupResponse
GroupResponse.description:
Group resource with all permission fields.

Returned by GET /groups/:id and POST /groups.
Permission fields are nullable — None means "not set (inherit from global)."

GroupSummaryResponse.title: GroupSummaryResponse
GroupSummaryResponse.description: Group summary returned by GET /groups (list view).

ResolvedPermissionsResponse.title: ResolvedPermissionsResponse
ResolvedPermissionsResponse.description:
Full resolved permissions returned by GET /debug/resolve.

Mirrors hindclaw_ext.models.ResolvedPermissions but as an HTTP response model.

StrategyScopeResponse.title: StrategyScopeResponse
StrategyScopeResponse.description: Strategy scope entry returned by GET /banks/:bank/strategies.

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description: User resource returned by GET/POST/PUT endpoints.
